caption: A man with silver-grey spiked hair and glasses is seated in a studio, wearing a white button-down shirt and a red patterned bow tie. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black professional microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall decorated with various photographs and a "LEE" branded item. To his left and right, white graphic overlays appear on the screen; one reads "PODCAST" below a logo, and another reads "GOSS TALK JOY" next to a microphone icon. As the scene progresses, the man shifts his expression from a neutral look to speaking, gesturing with his right hand raised in the air before returning his hand to his side and continuing to talk. The camera remains stationary, capturing his upper body and the surrounding studio environment throughout the sequence.
